variants.name: checkbox-basic
variants.description: Checkbox indicator on the left + label only. No description text. Most compact layout.

variants.name: check+description
variants.description: Checkbox indicator on the left + label + secondary description text below the label. No border container.

variants.name: check-boxed
variants.description: Label + description on the left, checkbox indicator on the right, enclosed in a bordered card container. Border changes to primary color when checked.

states.name: off
states.description: Default state. Indicator is an empty outlined square. Container border (boxed variant) uses --layout/border.

states.name: on
states.description: Selected state. Indicator fills with --selector/bg-active and shows a white checkmark. In check-boxed, the container border changes to --main-colors/primary.

states.name: intermediate
states.description: Indeterminate state. Indicator fills with --selector/bg-active and shows a white horizontal dash. Available at the _base-checkbox level. Use only for 'select all' parent controls. Maps to aria-checked=mixed.

sizes.name: default
sizes.note: Single size only. No size variants confirmed.

checkbox-indicator.description: 24×24px square selection control. Based on the _base-checkbox sub-component. Renders three visual states: off (empty outline), on (filled with checkmark), intermediate (filled with dash). Positioned left in checkbox-basic and check+description; right in check-boxed.

description.description: Secondary clarifying text below the label. Regular, 14px, --text/placeholder.

card-container.description: Bordered card wrapper with drop shadow and rounded corners. Checkbox indicator is on the right inside this container. Border changes to primary when checked.

baseComponents.name: _base-checkbox
baseComponents.description: The square checkbox indicator. Supports three states: on (filled, checkmark), off (empty outline), intermediate (filled, dash). The master Checkbox component exposes on/off only; intermediate is available at the base level.

baseComponents.name: _base-label-checkbox
baseComponents.description: The text container. Supports two internal modes: basic (label only) and label+desc (label with description below). Shared with the Radio Select component.
